title: Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) enhancements
body:
* **Agent mode is generally available**: Agent mode in Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces) is now generally available. Agent mode uses multi-step reasoning to answer complex, exploratory questions with a report that includes citations, visualizations, and supporting tables. See [Agent mode in Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie/agent-mode).
* **Retrieve visualization results using the API (Beta)**: You can now retrieve visualization results from Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces) using the API. See  [Retrieve visualization results (Beta)](/aws/en/genie/conversation-api#get-visualization) and the [Genie API reference](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/genie).
* **Upload local files for analysis**: You can now upload local Excel and CSV files to an Agent Mode chat for ad-hoc analysis. See [Upload a file to a Genie Agent](/aws/en/genie/file-upload).
* **Expanded chat history**: Fixed a bug where each user's chat history was limited to 20 past conversations. Chat history is no longer capped. See [Review chats](/aws/en/genie/talk-to-genie#review-chats).
* **Add to Dashboard permission fix**: Fixed a bug where users with Consumer access could see the **Add to Dashboard** button without permission.

ref_links.text: Upload a file to a Genie Agent
